# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: EC2 instances with EBS volumes for application data

Parameters:
  VpcId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::Id
    Description: VPC for the instances
  SubnetId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet::Id
    Description: Subnet for the instances
  KeyName:
    Type: AWS::EC2::KeyPair::KeyName
    Description: EC2 Key Pair for SSH access
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.micro
    AllowedValues:
      - t3.micro
      - t3.small
      - t3.medium
      - t3.large
      - t3.xlarge
  AmiId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Image::Id
    Description: AMI ID for the instances
  InstanceCount:
    Type: Number
    Default: 2
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 10
  AppVolumeSize:
    Type: Number
    Default: 20
    MinValue: 1
    Description: Size in GiB for application data volume
  AppVolumeType:
    Type: String
    Default: gp3
    AllowedValues:
      - gp2
      - gp3
      - io1
      - io2
      - st1
      - sc1
      - standard
  SSHLocation:
    Type: String
    Default: 0.0.0.0/0
    Description: CIDR range allowed to SSH

Resources:
  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Enable SSH access
      VpcId: !Ref VpcId
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref SSHLocation
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0

  EC2InstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: /
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore

  EC2InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Path: /
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2InstanceRole

  EC2Instance1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref AmiId
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      KeyName: !Ref KeyName
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetId
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-instance-1'

  AppVolume1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAtt EC2Instance1.AvailabilityZone
      Size: !Ref AppVolumeSize
      VolumeType: !Ref AppVolumeType
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-app-volume-1'

  AppVolumeAttachment1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Properties:
      Device: /dev/sdf
      InstanceId: !Ref EC2Instance1
      VolumeId: !Ref AppVolume1

  EC2Instance2:
    Condition: CreateSecondInstance
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref AmiId
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      KeyName: !Ref KeyName
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetId
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-instance-2'

  AppVolume2:
    Condition: CreateSecondInstance
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAtt EC2Instance2.AvailabilityZone
      Size: !Ref AppVolumeSize
      VolumeType: !Ref AppVolumeType
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-app-volume-2'

  AppVolumeAttachment2:
    Condition: CreateSecondInstance
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Properties:
      Device: /dev/sdf
      InstanceId: !Ref EC2Instance2
      VolumeId: !Ref AppVolume2

  EC2Instance3:
    Condition: CreateThirdInstance
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref AmiId
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      KeyName: !Ref KeyName
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetId
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-instance-3'

  AppVolume3:
    Condition: CreateThirdInstance
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAtt EC2Instance3.AvailabilityZone
      Size: !Ref AppVolumeSize
      VolumeType: !Ref AppVolumeType
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-app-volume-3'

  AppVolumeAttachment3:
    Condition: CreateThirdInstance
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Properties:
      Device: /dev/sdf
      InstanceId: !Ref EC2Instance3
      VolumeId: !Ref AppVolume3

  EC2Instance4:
    Condition: CreateFourthInstance
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref AmiId
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      KeyName: !Ref KeyName
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetId
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-instance-4'

  AppVolume4:
    Condition: CreateFourthInstance
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAtt EC2Instance4.AvailabilityZone
      Size: !Ref AppVolumeSize
      VolumeType: !Ref AppVolumeType
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-app-volume-4'

  AppVolumeAttachment4:
    Condition: CreateFourthInstance
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Properties:
      Device: /dev/sdf
      InstanceId: !Ref EC2Instance4
      VolumeId: !Ref AppVolume4

  EC2Instance5:
    Condition: CreateFifthInstance
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref AmiId
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      KeyName: !Ref KeyName
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetId
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-instance-5'

  AppVolume5:
    Condition: CreateFifthInstance
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAtt EC2Instance5.AvailabilityZone
      Size: !Ref AppVolumeSize
      VolumeType: !Ref AppVolumeType
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-app-volume-5'

  AppVolumeAttachment5:
    Condition: CreateFifthInstance
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Properties:
      Device: /dev/sdf
      InstanceId: !Ref EC2Instance5
      VolumeId: !Ref AppVolume5

  EC2Instance6:
    Condition: CreateSixthInstance
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref AmiId
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      KeyName: !Ref KeyName
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetId
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-instance-6'

  AppVolume6:
    Condition: CreateSixthInstance
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAtt EC2Instance6.AvailabilityZone
      Size: !Ref AppVolumeSize
      VolumeType: !Ref AppVolumeType
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-app-volume-6'

  AppVolumeAttachment6:
    Condition: CreateSixthInstance
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Properties:
      Device: /dev/sdf
      InstanceId: !Ref EC2Instance6
      VolumeId: !Ref AppVolume6

  EC2Instance7:
    Condition: CreateSeventhInstance
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref AmiId
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      KeyName: !Ref KeyName
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetId
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-instance-7'

  AppVolume7:
    Condition: CreateSeventhInstance
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAtt EC2Instance7.AvailabilityZone
      Size: !Ref AppVolumeSize
      VolumeType: !Ref AppVolumeType
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-app-volume-7'

  AppVolumeAttachment7:
    Condition: CreateSeventhInstance
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Properties:
      Device: /dev/sdf
      InstanceId: !Ref EC2Instance7
      VolumeId: !Ref AppVolume7

  EC2Instance8:
    Condition: CreateEighthInstance
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref AmiId
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      KeyName: !Ref KeyName
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetId
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-instance-8'

  AppVolume8:
    Condition: CreateEighthInstance
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAtt EC2Instance8.AvailabilityZone
      Size: !Ref AppVolumeSize
      VolumeType: !Ref AppVolumeType
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-app-volume-8'

  AppVolumeAttachment8:
    Condition: CreateEighthInstance
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Properties:
      Device: /dev/sdf
      InstanceId: !Ref EC2Instance8
      VolumeId: !Ref AppVolume8

  EC2Instance9:
    Condition: CreateNinthInstance
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref AmiId
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      KeyName: !Ref KeyName
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetId
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-instance-9'

  AppVolume9:
    Condition: CreateNinthInstance
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAtt EC2Instance9.AvailabilityZone
      Size: !Ref AppVolumeSize
      VolumeType: !Ref AppVolumeType
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-app-volume-9'

  AppVolumeAttachment9:
    Condition: CreateNinthInstance
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Properties:
      Device: /dev/sdf
      InstanceId: !Ref EC2Instance9
      VolumeId: !Ref AppVolume9

  EC2Instance10:
    Condition: CreateTenthInstance
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref AmiId
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      KeyName: !Ref KeyName
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetId
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-instance-10'

  AppVolume10:
    Condition: CreateTenthInstance
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAtt EC2Instance10.AvailabilityZone
      Size: !Ref AppVolumeSize
      VolumeType: !Ref AppVolumeType
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-app-volume-10'

  AppVolumeAttachment10:
    Condition: CreateTenthInstance
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Properties:
      Device: /dev/sdf
      InstanceId: !Ref EC2Instance10
      VolumeId: !Ref AppVolume10

Conditions:
  CreateSecondInstance: !Not [!Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 1]]
  CreateThirdInstance: !Or
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 3]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 4]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 5]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 6]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 7]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 8]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 9]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 10]
  CreateFourthInstance: !Or
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 4]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 5]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 6]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 7]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 8]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 9]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 10]
  CreateFifthInstance: !Or
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 5]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 6]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 7]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 8]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 9]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 10]
  CreateSixthInstance: !Or
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 6]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 7]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 8]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 9]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 10]
  CreateSeventhInstance: !Or
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 7]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 8]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 9]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 10]
  CreateEighthInstance: !Or
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 8]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 9]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 10]
  CreateNinthInstance: !Or
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 9]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 10]
  CreateTenthInstance: !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 10]

Outputs:
  SecurityGroupId:
    Value: !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
  Instance1Id:
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance1
  Instance2Id:
    Condition: CreateSecondInstance
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance2
  Instance3Id:
    Condition: CreateThirdInstance
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance3
  Instance4Id:
    Condition: CreateFourthInstance
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance4
  Instance5Id:
    Condition: CreateFifthInstance
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance5
  Instance6Id:
    Condition: CreateSixthInstance
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance6
  Instance7Id:
    Condition: CreateSeventhInstance
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance7
  Instance8Id:
    Condition: CreateEighthInstance
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance8
  Instance9Id:
    Condition: CreateNinthInstance
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance9
  Instance10Id:
    Condition: CreateTenthInstance
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance10
